star_1.text: The update ruin the game. The previous version of the game allowed players to be able to level up any characters with out collecting cards. That gave players control and options. You have to now collect cards to unlock players. This is poor game design because you striped control away fron vetern players who enjoyed playing the game the way it was. As a game designer I would say there could have been a better way to introduce the card mechanic rather than taking away from the players experienc

The new update ruined the game. Character tokens are no more 🙁. This card system changes it to where you won't need to wait for events for characters like Whisper or whoever, you'll find cards for many characters while playing. But since characters now have rarities, they not only require a crazy amount of cards to get but some cards are more scarce than others, making unlocking characters infinitely more tedious. Not to mention the new character menu is abysmal to scroll through. Uninstalled.

With the new card system update, the game went from a solid 4 to a zero if I could rate it. 4stars because the boss system in the game is dull and boring, and is a waste of time on top of poor camera angles at times. Now, the game is a 1 star because not only did the amount of rings need to upgrade characters increased, we have to collect cards in order to do so. Plus the cards is an obstruction of view coupled with the already poor camera angles. If they want their game to die, then keep it up.

Overall it's a pretty good game, nothing much to say 1/7/26 upon returning to this game on a new phone all my data was reset which really sucks cuz I had a lot of stuff, if I can get back then this review will change, but if not then idk why my stuff has been deleted

Really disappointed in the constant disruptions. I can't comfortably play this game without getting asked to spend tokens and made to watch advertising holding me back. the ads aren't implimented in a way that's thoughtful and user friendly.

game made to make you lose to force you to use resources and eventually make you buy them. even card reveals shows you a x75 card, and when you log back it resets to reveal a x25 card. shame it could have been a fun game instead of frustrating one

most ads keep freezing the game after last update. even before that a lot of ads glitched and rebooted the game. how about an update that fixes all the problems once and for all rather than replaces one problem with another for once? that'd nice
freemium thru and thru. pay for more lives / chances to play. marginally fun but not worth the ads you can't escape and upgrades they keep pushing.
hate games that that offer u to CHOOSE if u want to play a commercial, and when u say no they play it anyways, and commercials like Temu send u to the app store when u close it out by pushing X

Just sad how you still can't fix or update a few models in the game, like modernizing Jet's model, or fixing Vampire Shadow's gloves. Can't even add new permanent areas, and can't even make gems and Red Star Rings useful again. The free revive got removed entirely too. It's pretty clear now why people stopped playing this game. You can't even modernize the game and just make it more about micro transactions.

Had been playing this game for years. Spent a lot of time with it, had quite a lot of stuff. Changed my phone and none of my progress is saved. Contacted support and they said log into Google play and play for a few minutes, if nothing happens then my data is lost...no help at all! And to top it off, I come back to find that they have completely changed the game with a new card system to get characters so you cannot even buy them with rings anymore! It has now truly become a typical mobile game!

I wish I could give zero stars for this garbage game. who the F would ever let you download a game only to make you pay for it, oh yeah these garbage developers. only had enough red stars to play the first three levels and the ONLY way to replenish them is to pay real money. this is truly misleading and very poor marketing. so this game is basically just a TRIAL VERSION. unless you have lots of money to continuously keep buying red stars every time your character dies then don't bother here
the game freezes after every run and i lose all my rings, this happens every time and its getting really frustrating. please fix the issue. The issue is still happening.

It's superb! I'm really enjoying this game, thank you Edit: initially I had given this game 5 star rating, came back to it 3 years later. Things were good until the game decides to somehow reset itself, hence lost all my progress despite having liked it to my Google Play account. I couldn't restore my progress, left with no choice but to delete the game. There's no way I'll be able to play this with my lost progress, not to mention for the 2nd time, since the progress made 3 years ago was gone

2 minute unskippable ad after a run and unfair obstacle placement. Puts up a wall you can't see behind that you have to duck under only to give you a split second to see 2 obstacles you can't jump or duck under and one you have to duck under. You have to change lanes and dodge in that split second or automatically lose.
the best sonic game in here but i just lost everything in the i was at level 14 i tryed updating the game by mistake i deleted the game i have play again 😑😑😑😑😑😒😒😒😒😒😔😔

Before I said 250 was a lot of tokens to get.. NOW YOU WANT US TO GET 1000. EACH?!?!? That's literally so freaking absurd. It takes me half an hour at least to get 250. I don't want to spend way more time to get another character that does the same thing as the others just with a different design. It's kinda reasonable on why you gave us five days to get the character but I'm the type of person to do it all in half an hour so I don't have to worry about missing a character for another week.
Too many ads after every run and rings are harder to collect than before. Please consider balancing gameplay by making easier to get rings.
too much ads no mini games to receive rewards

It doesn't let you restore your Google Play games save data anymore. Lost lots of progress. On top of that, it's also full of full screen intrusive ads. I know SEGA has to make money somehow, but not this way. Not when they could choose non-intrusive ads, or do it like Nintendo does and not put any ads into their games. It's sad, it really is, because I used to like this game. But this is how it is.

star_2.text: There's a lot about this game that bugs me. Mainly, the cloud saves. The dates are completely wrong, saying they were made at 6 am, but last time I played was an hour ago on a different device. Secondly, the new challenges you need to do in one run. At first I didn't mind them, but then certain things like destroying a certain enemy, or picking a certain power up became hard, because these things become so rare suddenly.

Just like Sonic Forces, the ads and constant videos for other apps RUIN an otherwise nice game. Every time you crash into a wall (which happens a lot when you're 7 years old and just learning), you have to sit thru another watch-this-and-lets-download-the-app commercial. I was supervising my son to see how this app would go and we both reached peak frustration in <10 minutes. We both LOVE Sonic and thus would have loved to see all the characters like Chaotix. But the ads ruin it.

I downloaded the game, and it was really fun. But I'm not sure if it was a recent update or what. Now, when you hit springs, you only get rings instead of rings and player cards, and now you can only get player cards occasionally scattered across maps and if you beat bosses. Is it some ploy to just get people to pay to get certain players? I'm not sure, but it's extremely frustrating, especially because I know how it was before this update. and it was extremely fun to play before.

This game was really addictive, but after they added the cards, it completely ruined the fun of the game. It's nice being able to unlock all characters through the cards, but the fact that you have to still collect cards in order to just UPGRADE your characters is stupid. If you had the game before the update and managed to fully upgrade your characters before the cards, then you're lucky, but if not, good luck upgrading, because now it's nearly impossible.

Ok app. Card system is not the best, I liked it how it was before. And I don't like the fact that characters like Omega or Surge are in the game, but can only be unlocked by purchasing them, their cards don't show up when you run, meaning you also can't upgrade them, which is a shame because I was looking forward to playing as Omega, but I do not want to pay $6 for a pay-to-win character.

I used to love sonic dash, played it everyday and today I felt like re-downloading the game again, just to find out that I've lost everything, my levels, my red rings, my characters, my skins, everything, the event items and my boost, every single thing and honestly I do t even want to play the game anymore. only thing I have left as evidence that the account existed is my achievements

I really love this game. Great time waster and a great cast of characters, but this update with the card system either needs to change or just go. Getting characters with the cards is fine, but now red rings are almost next to useless. Upgrading characters with cards is beyond dumb. It takes forever to upgrade ONE time. I think they also decrease the time length for the power ups. Magnets used to last a good chunk of time, but now I can't get through a single section without finding another one.

This mobile game had potential back in the day, it used to play a lot differently. The movement and camera angles are enough to make you motion sick. The spin wheel is without a doubt rigged. I had 200 red stars that I sank into the wheel (2 stars per spin) and never once got the legendary. Not only that, you are forced to watch ads if you want to level a character's stats. Now you can no longer out right buy the character you want, you have to grind cards in game. I'll legit give it a 4/10.

I used to really enjoy this game, and I still believe it is quite fun. However, Sega made some major changes to the gameplay that i absolutely do not like at all. You used to be able to level up characters anytime, but now, you need to collect cards on the track, which makes it extremely annoying when playing events, when you have to attempt to collect a specific card, I'd be fine if the cards were for characters you don't own, but how it is now makes the game super grindy and less fun.

I once again returned to Sonic Dash to find a new way to acquire and level up characters. At first, I was surprised if I was able to obtain characters, even events ones for free, but since this is technically free, there's a catch. You can only collect so many in a day before the game itself tells you "collected the maximum cards for today" Keep in mind you use the cards to unlock characters and level them up, not to mention now the store has cards cost actual money up to 30$

At one point, this game was a 5 star for me. It was amazing even with the ad after every run (i would just play in airplane mode). But ever since the card system? Disasterous. What would once take like an hour to get 1k character coin now takes arduous DAYS of worm to get even 50 cards, and its basically impossible to get the character now. Upgrading charaxters is a NIGHTMARE. Even if you have the rings, you cant use them because of the card system, and the layout is horrinous.

The card system is a real down grade to the game. I understand wanting to change it to entice new players but instead it turns away players. It's near impossible to get new characters and difficult to upgrade characters you want because the cards are random on the tracks. Fun game to play that takes little time and is easy to play during short breaks. Would enjoy it more if it didn't have ads literally everywhere.

I used to play this game all the time. Absolutly loved it. But they updated it and pretty much made it so easy that it just feels like a newborn could pick up the game and get all the characters in like a week. Don't get me wrong this game used to be one of my childhood favorites but it was because I actually had to work for what I got. Now it just gives free handouts. Also no point in even playing the other characters it's just sonic with a new skin. At least change the characters moves or sum.

It's a great games, keeps me entertained for hours, with tons of character that are hard to get, over all lots of fun. Except my animal rescue habitat thing is bugged as hell. I just finished the chicken habitat and I should have gotten Shadow but I haven't?? And for some reason the bar is at 200%?? Why? It worked fine with the other areas but not with this one.

It's a decent game. Problems? The controls are extremely clunky(sometimes I roll, I don't roll; sometimes I move over, I don't move), models and some animations look unrefined and stale (Amy, though I like her, runs like a 2-year-old), and, of course, like Subway Surfers' keys, I struggle to find red star rings. Back to the gameplay, I have a very unnecessarily difficult time getting past part 3 and up. Hard Light, if you want me invested, please refine your game.

Most people can agree on that this used to be a decent game, but now they've just ruined it, the limited characters feel impossible to get with all the other cards on the track, and the fact there's a limit for how many you can collect in a day, the game has been completely ruined, why make every character available for cards just to limit the amount, I get you have to make money but this is absurd, if you want to have a good time play on an older version or find a modded version.

I played this game a lot when it first came out, and enjoyed it a lot. It had a limited amount of content at the time, but was fun. So recently I decided to play it again, and found that it was buggy–it crashed after every run–but playable. The card system seems adequate enough, except after a few days I got "Reward limit reached" telling me I couldn't get more cards that day. So I waited for midnight to pass and nothing. I still can't. I have no reason to believe I can continue to progress.

I love this game, but... the glitches are everywhere in this game. Sometimes when I unlock an character I have unlock that character again for some strange reason. Sometimes I pass through objects, or my boost might straight up not work. There are more but, I listed some of them. This review is from an actual sonic fan... And let's be real this game is not good. ^⁠_⁠^

I used to love this game when progression didn't feel unfair. Just a few minutes ago the game was updated. And I went from earning 30 gems per mission...to 1. And the builds require upwards of 1,000. I was almost done, I was almost going to feel like I accomplished something, and then you stripped that away. You've soured the game by stunting progression, and I'm positive you're about to lose downloads for it, too.

I love Subway Surfers and Sonic, so a Sonic-style Subway Surfers type game seemed perfect. But, the game is frustratingly unplayable. The controls are incredibly laggy or sometimes completely unresponsive. I've died so many times because a swipe never registered. I REALLY want to like this game, but it really is impossible to play. My phone is a few years old, so that could be to blame, but Subway Surfers runs fine on it so this game should, too...

star_3.text: I mean, it's fine. As someone who played what I assume are both the "old" versions of this game, it still IS Sonic Dash. But there are some things I find problematic. For one, the missions. Now, in and of themselves, they're fine. But the wait times in between are AWFUL. And obviously, the card system. It's an interesting concept, but they shouldn't have gone with it. I honestly preferred when you got characters via red rings, but I digress. Overall, a fine experience. Old versions were better.

I'm not gonna lie. This game could be better by now. New Characters being over pricey, Events for characters who can be unlocked for free, having 10x as many ads as forces speed battle. ( on that note have a lot less characters than the game itself and the fact that sonic dash still get updates make me sad. ) and we could also use a wider variety of boosters, too. And we should get a small reward for each time we beat high scores past 1 million. I'm not ending a run just to get an ad to the face

Although the game is well made and structured decently, the movie event is a bit of a pain. All three characters for both movies so far have required 500 cards to unlock. But because they are all legendary, you get a very set amount per area. On top of that, once the event is over, any characters you did not unlock get their cards removed from the gace of the earth. An easy fix for this issue would be to add them to the spring bounce rewards through leveling up, like the others.

This game is very good. It is faithful to the Sonic series. Graphically awesome. Gameplay can lag as sometimes it will not register an action in time. Like a delay. There are only three different stages so the variety is lacking. Wish they had more levels, like Scrap Brain, Chemical Plant, The Ark, etc. Also daily challenges don't always work. This game can be improved definitely.

EDITED SINCE I RAN INTO MORE THINGS: Its a really good game overall, but I would like to address some things. Sometimes the app closes randomly at the main menu, and the game lags aswell. I would like to fight other villains other than Eggman and Zazz. When you jump up into the air as any character, when you swipe, it does nothing. Oh, and a small other thing. When switching lanes as Rouge, she stops flying for a moment. Another edit: just doin' this for the prize.

This is a very fun gane with a few things holding it back. Firstly, the ads are far too plentiful, with no way to buy out of them. Secondly, the fact that there are a few characters locked behind a pay wall. Not a steep one, mind you, but a pay wall nonetheless. Thirdly, and this is sort of a combination of issues, the collision of the game is tied to the framerate, which drops often on my Galaxy S7. I've missed too many powerups because of this. Can't fully recommend until these are fixed.

It's a really good game, one of the better endless runners out there. Unlike most of the other players, I like the card system, but there are two major flaws to it. The first is that you can only get cards for the rarest characters during certain events. The second problem is that you can't collect cards when playing offline. When the game is connected to the internet it gets very laggy past the second or third spring, making the game nearly unplayable.

A simple running game. Play as your favorite Sonic characters, and upgrade them. I tend to get a little lag, which often kills me, and it'll stop taking commands if I'm in a signal less area. Otherwise, a good waste of time. I'd only get it if you're a Sonic fan though. Update: They added a daily card limit, to halt your progress in collecting characters. VERY GREEDY.

Played this when it first came out and it's still fun coming back to now. I love the different characters and the little boss fights are cool. The controls are really nice and I don't ever really have any problems with it. :> Edit: I hate the new cards and card limits. I also hate the new upgrade system. It makes it a lot less fun and less of a reason to keep playing. I have characters now that I'll never be able to upgrade from collecting cards to raise the limit. Annoying.

The most recent update (7.0.0) added character cards to the game. You must collect MANY (upwards of 200+) of these character cards on the track to unlock characters, and more are necessary for upgrading them since the ring price for upgrades has gone way up. While this way you are able to work towards what used to be event-exclusive characters (except Legendaries), it requires you to sink MUCH more time into it, and the cards on the track are causing frame drops (especially after spring bounces)

A lot of obstacles are obstructed from the player's view, whether it be by the scenery, enemies, power-ups, other obstacles, out of camera view due to a turn in the road, etc., forcing the player to just guess what's coming next especially on the harder runs. This leads to a lot of runs ending unfairly due to an incorrect guess. I'd suggest either making the obstacles transparent or allow multiple camera options (or both) to mitigate the issue. Decent runner, regardless; It's almost good.

Decent timekiller, but it needs more content. The characters are just skins, it feels the same to play no matter who you pick. If you play for 20 minutes, you've seen everything the game has to offer. Also, it's impossible to upgrade characters after their event is over. The character you're playing as should always be able to collect cards of themselves.

This game has no sense of style, it's your basic walmart sonic style, very boring and has lack of expression. The checkpoint system is also very slow, it should take inspiration from the sonic rush special stages, and the bosses have no variety. At least it's a decent game for what it is, but it has zero personality nonetheless. I still have this game because I'm a big sonic fan. Just wish that I had more reason to play this game again

The game glitches often and runs slowly. Expect major lag and glitches that cause you to die. At the end of runs you get ads that restart the game and lose your progress. Despite these issues I love the premise of the game, the gameplay, and the collectable characters. The time in the air is really long that could be worked on as well. Overall a good game despite its shortcomings.

It's alright, some childhood nostalgia, but their events are nigh impossible to complete. I redownloaded right at the start of the Burning Blaze event, and did the math. You'll need a couple thousand of her cards to fully upgrade her. No way that's doable in 5 days. Still fun tho, great as a casual experience. Also nice that ads are quickly skippable and microtransactions aren't required to progress. Would recommend to certain people, not for everyone for sure.

The fact this game is still up aver since like 2013 is a testament to its simple, yet complex gameplay. The gameplay itself is solid, and runs smoothly. The only real drawback is how ad-heavy the game has become. Every time a run ends, every now and then when trying to upgrade a character, and more, you will get an ad. It's a minor inconvience turned aggravating due to the sheer numbers of adverts.

The card system is much better now thanks to the updates. But some of the older characters in the game should get their events back. Baby sonic and the 3 Lego characters have not gotten their events in such a long time. I want to unlock them but their cards don't even appear in the store. So much of the older characters in the game have been forgotten that they aren't playable to people who didn't unlock them the first time. Please bring their events back.

It's a nice game for sure, but there's one problem with it. I don't know why it does it, but it keeps on deleting my progress, even after I just spent a good portion of the night to get Dragon I hunter Lancelot.🙁 its happened with my other phone as well, so it's not just this phone. Like I said a good game; just can't seem to figure out why it keeps deleting my progress.🙄

It's a great Free Runner game based on Sonic. Collecting coins to level up your upgrades if quick and easy and there's no penalty for failure. Achievements are fun to unlock and take a moderate amount of time. An endless runner game like subway Surfers except with iconic characters and faster tracks. The music is best played with the volume down and you wish you could skull the slow parts.

The game is fun, but I have alot of issues w/ it. Why do they look like they're runnjng so slow, on the sonic forces app, they run so much better and the graphics are so much better, all characters look kinda dumb when they run. I just think this game needs to atleast look like sonic forces if its going to be the same kinda game concept. The game play is fine, but come on they could look so much better with the character animation, like what is Amy doing when she runs.

star_4.text: As far as endless runners go, this is a good one. I've been playing off and on since the additional characters still had blue aura effects. I like how you can play even as lesser used characters like Cream, Blaze, and Big being playable is so funny. If I could give any suggestions, it would be to be able to back up save data to your account. It really bites to have to start over after reinstalling. Luckily, even old event characters are unlockable in later level ups. That's really appreciated.

I love this game very much, but I can't help but feel a bit frustrated with it. Half of the characters I have do little things that irritate me into not wanting to play as them. For example Blaze's hair tie being pink now, Amy's new run cycle, the way that Shadow switches lanes, characters who float along the track still and ominously, and characters that are lumpy when they roll instead of being nice and smooth. Silly asks, I know, but it would really mean the world to me. Thank you.

I regret not getting back into this game sooner! There are so many improvements since I last played! On the other hand, I wonder what happened to the Green Hill Zone song. I'm preaty sure Seaside Hill is playing instead. I also miss the horizontal gameplay option. Unfortunately, they only kept 5 red star ring continues for a short time. They also stopped offering a second spin at the prize wheel free with add!!! There's no free with add continue anymore, either!!!

I'm playing this in 2025 and still having a good time playing, once good and it stays good. great game guys! I also love how you are still looking after it! :) The only thing that could use some care is the boss battles, because at first Eggman and Zazz seemed exciting, but as time goes on, it gets less and less exciting, so maybe consider adding more bosses? and also having it so that the bosses are randomized and it doesn't tell you what boss it is, but still indicates that it is a boss?

Good game, still as good as I remember. But with some amazing additions. Only problems I have are with there not being enough rings to upgrade characters/the upgrades being a bit expensive. The other issue is that when you get an item,points from a power up, or anything appears over your character it's very hard to see what's in front of you. Making it really easy to just run into an obstacle. Other than these two small issues, this game is great and just as fun as I remember it being.

The game is pretty good itself, with some of the new updates, being able to collect cards on the tracks and whatnot. Yet there's still more to it, like the static animation of characters and the fact that sometimes tracks will completely deny you passage after a while. Keep up the work though! Update: There is a glitch where blaze is doing air tricks, when you swipe left the tufts on her gloves will completely disappear. Again, good work though!

Has a reasonably big cast of characters with free-to-play friendly mechanics. Gems aren't hard to come by and neither are rings, the two most necessary currencies in the game. You're able to unlock most of the cast simply by playing the game and making progress throughout the various stages or zones. The only real issue I have with this game is that some characters are locked behind pay walls...which makes no sense to me. Why offer most of the cast for essentially free while chargingfortherest?

A fantastic game. But it just isn't the same. Lacks the flair of other Sonic games I've played. Having grown up with Sonic, I guess I may be a little biased. But maybe some cinematics or maybe a storyline, like Sonic Generations (I really enjoyed that game), but other than that, it's a good game. Thank you. Please keep this game offline, I've seen many games go online that I can no longer enjoy everywhere I go.

I gave this game a very blank review with add more characters, which they did,but since then,I have realized a couple more things that I now dislike. For one,there hasn't been a new stage in a looooong time, like years, couple that with now a lot of lagging it makes for a boring experience. I've also been play sonic forces speed battle which is like the Big Brother to this game. Dash stands no chance speed battle is better in every way with online play and more characters, mabye its time to go.

Don't get me wrong, I love this game and enjoy all Sonic content. But even I'll admit, there are a lot glitches and sudden death hazards. The game will lag sometimes at the start and I would instantly lose my rings. Overall, I still impressed by the graphics. I love this game and I would rank it as one of my favorite Sonic games.

Nice game. There are a few things they could add for Sonic fans. Updated: They have added several things to the game that makes it a much more complete package. The stage building, new levels and characters, and other additions made me come back to playing and enjoying this game. If you like Sonic, Subway Surfers or both(like me), give this game a chance.

I love this game. It's a fun experience and the cards don't reset, but the most annoying thing is the REWARD LIMIT?! I had 149 cards for classic Super Sonic and couldn't collect any more because of the reward limit. And I only had one Red Star Ring. So, naturally, I took matters into my own hands. What I'm saying is, SEGA, remove the reward limit.

It's a cute little mobile game. The gameplay does get pretty repetitive because all you really do is run endlessly and collect items to do it slightly differently (like getting a new skin), but for a mobile game this is pretty good. There are a LOT of characters to collect so there's a good chance your favorite one might be in here, it just might be locked behind a certain level (or event depending on who it is).

I've played for a long time, even before the character cards were a thing, and it has been and still is amazing. The only issue I see is when you start getting surplus cards of a fully upgraded character. There's nothing more to do with them, but you just keep getting more cards that do nothing. If you stopped being able to get a characters cards when they were fully upgraded or could trade them in for cards for other characters that still need more cards, I think the game would be near perfect.

I played since the beginning, I really like the game. However, the more recent updates and change of the game has disappointed me. I had almost everyone unlocked, after the update I no longer had my roster. I even had the angry birds characters unlocked. I like collabs that this game has had. I just do not like knowing I had such a large roster and with one update it is all gone.

This game is really fun! The gameplay is fun, the characters that you unlock are awesome, some of the tracks are amazing as well, It's also a good game because you can play offline, rather then your other game. But why I'm rating this game four stars is because of a few problems. 1. lag, after you play a round for a bit, you lag to the point you can't play, 2. Cards, I think this feature is a bit dumb because if you max out on characters you still get cards. Over all the game is fun, recommend.

honestly,I really like this game and I play it a lot...but that's the problem. I've played it so much that I've unlocked all worlds,and almost all characters. I just wish there were some other worlds that you can unlock like,chemical plant,radical highway,and city escape and some more bosses because just Eggman and zazz gets kind of boring...and I have too many gems now and I don't know what to do with them. overall,I really like this game and the recent update,but it could be more...

Let me be honest, this game is pretty good for passing the time when I'm on vacation or waiting at the airport. However, I do have two problems with this game. First, There are only two bosses in this game which kinda sucks. A wish their were some bosses from the newer and older sonic games. The second problem is that a some of characters that you can use, you will have to pay for. Also, you get ads which is expected for a free to play game but gets annoying. This game is pretty good.

Even with how old this game is, it still remains one of the best endless runners out there. That being said, I have 2 minor complaints. One, after you max out a character completely, there's nothing to use the cards for, yet you can still find them on the track and in spring sections. Two, really the same thing with the gems for the animal homes. They become useless once those are done. Simple solution for both: Let players exchange excess cards/gems for rings.

It is fun. although sometimes ads are annoying. I could live without them. And you can see under Amy's skirt in several scenes. The bosses are kind of easy to fight. But when you do the quick-time event sequence of attacking it moves to fast. The bosses are my favorite part. Wish there were more bosses. Like one for every zone. Events are fun but to easy.

star_5.text: The game just keeps getting better. The combo stuff is pretty cool, nice to see that come over from Sonic Dash 2, and I love the new springs too, adds some more flavor to the running. Would VERY MUCH like to see the Gems be usable for things other than the animal shelter building stuff, something that STILL hasn't been done, same with some more zones that aren't limited to certain events, but honestly, this game is doing really well.

It's nice to have a 3D sonic game that runs well on a phone, has many playable characters, and is a unique game that flows well with good moments of gameplay. It has some of my favorites like Shadow the hedgehog, Silver the hedgehog and Metal sonic. Dear Sega, I honestly wouldn't mind paying for a console port of Sonic Dash. If I could buy a version of the game on my Xbox Series X or Nintendo switch 2 that's slightly higher quality and has no ads I would in a heartbeat.

love this game! it has a variety of characters, a bunch of different zones and missions to give you something other than survive! with most mobile game ads, the ads are annoying, but in this game the ads are bearable, and not annoying!!...however, I wish there were more bosses beside Eggman and Zazz- but besides that, great game!

This has been my go-to game for almost ten years, since back when Sega used to support the Amazon Fire version. (Wish you guys would bring that version back, BTW...) It seems like Sega has addressed a lot of the problems I've had with the game for about a year or so, as they've added ways to make acquiring characters easier and more fair to the player. I also love the new features added to the track like the springs, it feels more Sonic-like than before. Overall great job, Sega, keep it up. 🙂

This game is so much better than Sonic Forces: Speed Battle. I can unlock new characters for free, but I wish players use tokens instead of cards to upgrade. The reason is that if we ran out of them, players will have to wait for another event before collecting the cards again. After I took a long break from the game, I played it, and the update was so much better than last time. I love that during a event, the event character only appears on the track. Thank you Sonic Team.

I'm much older now, and a lot has changed! When I was six, you would have to pay like 30,000 rings to get knuckles, but now it's easier to get the characters in the game. Lots of changes, but still the classic gameplay. Though I'd like more sight readability. When you get far, it becomes impossible to sight read. Other than that, pretty good.

the game is very fun to play, especially that now you can collect cards to get characters instead of paying for the characters. The characters are pretty hard to get, the character designs are very great and also cool. I'd honestly rate this game a 5/5, great and fun game. I have played this on different devices over the years, but seeing a new update, made me confused a little. I first didn't understand about the new character menu, but now I understand a lot.

Been seeing this game around for months so I thought I'd give it a try. It's amazing. Very generous rewards and I can play non-stop without having to pay a dime. Update - Been playing this for some time but it's getting to a point of wishing for more! Level 28 and the last track is pretty much the last of everything. Wish I could see more tracks like Radical Highway, City Escape, White Jungle etc. Hope to see more tracks released at later dates!

I really like the development of this game, with so many characters to unlock and the outfits for some are amazing. There ARE ads in this game, they only pop up if you choose to watch one to continue a run or upgrade a character. I also like how they made it a lot easier to unlock characters with cards instead of saving up so many red star rings. So thank you Sega for making another great game. UPDATE: pls add Vanilla the rabbit to the game sometime! I miss her so much, it would be appreciated!

Love this game a lot! there's many characters to unlock, and they all are amazing, I've got quite a few hours on this game (since it is endless) I love all the different special character events they have, and so far after having this game for a few months I've had no complaints! (other than when I was trying to move over my progress from one phone to another but that was more my own fault)

Yeah, it's your typical endless runner game, but the thing that sets it apart from the rest is it's impressive uniqueness in level design, mid-run boss fights, and even the SIMPLICITY of unlocking characters that no game has managed to achieve before. The skill trees are very useful when it comes to elongating your overall score, as well as Star Coins being very fair in terms of how much you use after each death (which is also dependant on how much you have to spare).

This game may be free to play, but it's from a much better time. Most of the stuff you pay for are either these neat little skins for your characters, or ways to cheese the game. Everything feels doable without paying. Main issue you may run into is ads, especially if you have a really old device those can be frustrating. It's impressive how they're continuing to support such an old mobile game, and very appreciated!

I love this game! I've played this since I was 6 years old and it's still a blast! The only problem I have is the new character card update. If you have a epic or legendary character, it is hard to upgrade your character since you can't find their cards on the track. I prefer the old version where you upgraded with rings only and you had to unlock characters with red star rings, but other than that it is still a really good game.

I love this game! So addicting. It's the most fun and relaxing runner I own. I've gotten to where all that's left to do is to upgrade the characters stats all the way. I would love it if there was a way to edit the habitats tho, because now I have no way to spend all these extra gems I've earned. You get 3 choices for some of the objects and they are unfortunately permanent. I usually picked the cheapest ones all the way thru, and I wish I could go back and buy the other choices as well.

This is a great and fun game. This is one of my favorite Sonic games. I really enjoy being able to play as various characters throughout Sonic's games, comics, cartoons, and movies. I'm glad Infinite was added, but I would still like to see Tikal and Chaos added. I've recently noticed Jet cards are now appearing so he can level up. Thank you for fixing this.

I love this game! It's fun to play, lots of characters and plenty of zones to break up the levels. Some criticism I do have: There are only two bosses, which isn't that bad but gets a little repetitive. Some of the characters look absolutely ridiculous when they run (cough, Vector, cough) but I think it adds character to the game. Definitely worth playing!

Sonic Dash is one of my favorite games. The new updates are really cool as well. Saving animals and building homes for them is a nice side thing to do and a good way to unlock characters. Speaking of unlocking characters, I also like how you now have multiple ways of unlocking characters, whether from buying them with red rings or building homes for the animals. Overall, I think Sonic Dash is a great mobile game!

I enjoy playing this game, especially with the addition of the track springs, dash rings and boost pads. But I would also like to see the addition to grind rails, more Badniks to have a better variety (like Buzz Bombers and such), maybe some cliffs on the sides with open water below where you can jump and do tricks in time to make it across each cliff as you dash to the other side, and of course, more levels so that the diamonds can have use instead of just having thousands of them sitting idle.

if you like sonic characters, this is definitely one of the better licensed mobile games. Unlocking characters is done very fairly, ads aren't too overbearing, and there's lots of characters and costumes to get. My only complaint is that the amount of stages available are a little lame. Three of them are based on Sonic Hero's first zone, and one is green hill. It would be cool to see more variety given how Sonic's originality with level themes is something they're famous for.

I've played this game for over 4-5 years at least and, I've gotta say, this is one heck of a game. I built every home and unlocked Jet the hawk and then I thought I was done playing. But NO! There are events that give you new characters and you can earn coins to upgrade your characters. Inna nutshell I'm saying that once you've built every little animal home, there is a LOT more to do. So basically the game never stops being fun. And there aren't that many glitches or bugs -have fun playing!
